title: Paint tool
goal: Draw strokes into an EditableImage with the mouse.

steps.body:
`EditableImage:DrawCircle` stamps a filled circle at a pixel
position. Combine it with mouse drag tracking and you have a
basic one-color paint brush.

Add the Paint LocalScript. Mouse down starts a stroke; mouse move
stamps a circle per event. Mouse up ends the stroke.
steps.explain:
This emits one brush stamp per `InputChanged` event rather than
interpolating between points, so fast drags produce dotted lines.
For smooth strokes, interpolate with `DrawLine` or multiple
circles between the previous and current positions.
steps.source:
local AssetService = game:GetService("AssetService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local W, H = 512, 512
local BRUSH_RADIUS = 8
local COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 60, 60)

local label = script.Parent
local img = AssetService:CreateEditableImage({ Size = Vector2.new(W, H) })
img:DrawRectangle(Vector2.zero, img.Size, Color3.new(1, 1, 1), 0, Enum.ImageCombineType.Overwrite)
label.ImageContent = Content.fromObject(img)

local painting = false

local function toPixel(screenPos)
  local ap, as = label.AbsolutePosition, label.AbsoluteSize
  return Vector2.new(
    math.floor((screenPos.X - ap.X) / as.X * W),
    math.floor((screenPos.Y - ap.Y) / as.Y * H)
  )
end

label.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
  if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
    painting = true
    img:DrawCircle(toPixel(input.Position), BRUSH_RADIUS, COLOR, 0, Enum.ImageCombineType.AlphaBlend)
  end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
  if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
    painting = false
  end
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
  if painting and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
    img:DrawCircle(toPixel(input.Position), BRUSH_RADIUS, COLOR, 0, Enum.ImageCombineType.AlphaBlend)
  end
end)

steps.body:
Press ▶ **Play** (F5). Click and drag in the canvas to paint red
strokes. Fast drags will look dotted — see the `explain` panel for
the fix.
